testcase.name: test_auth_me_without_token
testcase.failure: tests/test_runhub_api.py:123: in test_auth_me_without_token assert response.status_code == 401 E assert 200 == 401 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_ai_generate_plan_premium_user
testcase.failure: tests/test_runhub_api.py:222: in test_ai_generate_plan_premium_user assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_ai_generate_plan_non_premium_user

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: Registration failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"

testcase.error: tests/test_runhub_api.py:48: in test_user_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Registration failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Registration failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
